chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-580 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1) For orders on M.A No.4996/25 (urgency). 2) For orders on office objections. 3) For orders on M.A No.4997/25. 4) For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025. Mr. Aayatullah Khuwaja, Advocate for applicants/accused. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* In this matter, the learned counsel for the applicants/accused is seeking suspension of the NBWs issued against the applicants/accused in crime No.67 of 2024 by the learned trial Court due to absence of applicants/accused in trial of above mentioned crime. He further states that now the applicants/accused would appear before the learned Civil Judge/J.M-V Larkana which is the trial Court. Be that as it may, this is a case of protective bail/suspension of the NBWs issued against the applicants/accused in above mentioned crime which is hereby granted to the applicants/accused in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court for a period of Ten days. Applicants/accused are directed to surrender themselves before learned trial Court and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicants/accused fail to appear/surrender before the concerned Court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by them before this Court shall automatically stands forfeited. This Protective Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
